methodology.engine: Runs the packaged ECHO Standalone Engine JAR with --headless-smoke and measures process wall time plus sampled peak RSS.
methodology.legacy: Ingests existing legacy Standalone Runtime reports; with --run-legacy, measures selected Gradle smoke tasks as task-level evidence.
methodology.legacyClientLaunchProxy: With --run-legacy-client-launch, measures selected legacy client startup proxy tasks. These exercise the player-facing client assembly but are not visible packaged player-launch evidence.
methodology.comparabilityWarning: Legacy Gradle task timings are not direct player-launch timings and must not be used alone for replacement decisions.
